mapper.sql: select a.achievement_id, a.session_id, a.category, a.name, a.team_name, c.name as competition_name, p_view.contestants, ad_view.instructors, a.level, a.grade, a.track, a.certificate_no, a.group_id, a.award_time, a.year, a.owner_dep_id, a.is_reimburse, a.is_supplement, a.fee, a.reimbursement_fee, a.reimbursement_ratio, a.reimbursement_item_id, a.reimbursement_date, a.item_index, a.quality_index, a.submitted_at, a.reviewed_at, a.school_reviewed_at, a.review_result, a.schooi_review_result, a.review_reason, a.school_review_reason, a.audit_by, a.school_audit_by, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.remark from sam_achievement a left join sam_competition_session s on a.session_id = s.session_id left join sam_competition c on s.competition_id = c.id left join ( select p.achievement_id, group_concat(concat(ifnull(s.name, '-'), '(', ifnull(p.student_id, '-'), ')') order by p.order_no separator '，') as contestants from sam_achievement_participant p left join sam_student s on p.student_id = s.no group by p.achievement_id ) p_view on p_view.achievement_id = a.achievement_id left join ( select ad.achievement_id, group_concat(concat(ifnull(t.teacher_name, '-'), '(', ifnull(ad.teacher_id, '-'), ')') order by ad.order_no separator '，') as instructors from sam_achievement_advisor ad left join sam_teacher t on ad.teacher_id = t.no group by ad.achievement_id ) ad_view on ad_view.achievement_id = a.achievement_id
mapper.select: SELECT a.achievement_id, a.session_id, a.category, a.name, a.team_name, a.level, a.grade, a.track, a.certificate_no, a.group_id, a.award_time, a.year, a.owner_dep_id, a.is_reimburse, a.is_supplement, a.fee, a.reimbursement_fee, a.reimbursement_ratio, a.reimbursement_item_id, a.reimbursement_date, a.item_index, a.quality_index, a.submitted_at, a.reviewed_at, a.school_reviewed_at, a.review_result, a.schooi_review_result, a.review_reason, a.school_review_reason, a.audit_by, a.school_audit_by, a.create_by, a.update_by, a.create_time, a.update_time, a.del_flag, a.remark FROM sam_achievement a INNER JOIN sam_competition_session s ON a.session_id = s.id WHERE s.competition_id = #{competitionId} ORDER BY s.session DESC, a.create_time DESC
mapper.insert:
insert into sam_achievement
session_id, category, name, team_name, level, grade, track, certificate_no, group_id, award_time, year, owner_dep_id, is_reimburse, is_supplement, fee, reimbursement_fee, reimbursement_ratio, reimbursement_item_id, reimbursement_date, item_index, quality_index, submitted_at, reviewed_at, school_reviewed_at, review_result, schooi_review_result, review_reason, school_review_reason, audit_by, school_audit_by, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time, del_flag, remark,
#{sessionId}, #{category}, #{name}, #{teamName}, #{level}, #{grade}, #{track}, #{certificateNo}, #{groupId}, #{awardTime}, #{year}, #{ownerDepId}, #{isReimburse}, #{isSupplement}, #{fee}, #{reimbursementFee}, #{reimbursementRatio}, #{reimbursementItemId}, #{reimbursementDate}, #{itemIndex}, #{qualityIndex}, #{submittedAt}, #{reviewedAt}, #{schoolReviewedAt}, #{reviewResult}, #{schooiReviewResult}, #{reviewReason}, #{schoolReviewReason}, #{auditBy}, #{schoolAuditBy}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{delFlag}, #{remark},
mapper.delete:
delete from sam_achievement where achievement_id in
#{achievementId}

delete from sam_reimbursement_items where name in
#{name}
mapper.insert:
insert into sam_reimbursement_items( id, name, reimbursement_time, total_fee, paid_fee, amount, owner_dep_id, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values
( #{item.id}, #{item.name}, #{item.reimbursementTime}, #{item.totalFee}, #{item.paidFee}, #{item.amount}, #{item.ownerDepId}, #{item.status}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateBy}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.remark}, #{item.delFlag})
mapper.update: UPDATE sam_achievement SET reimbursement_item_id = NULL, reimbursement_fee = NULL, reimbursement_ratio = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE achievement_id = #{achievementId}

UPDATE sam_achievement SET reimbursement_item_id = NULL, reimbursement_fee = NULL, reimbursement_ratio = NULL, update_time = NOW() WHERE achievement_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.student_id as studentId, p.order_no as orderNo, p.manager, s.name as studentName, s.no as studentNo, s.class_name as className, d.dept_name as depName FROM sam_participant p LEFT JOIN sam_student s ON p.student_id = s.student_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON s.dep_id = d.dept_id WHERE p.achievement_id = #{achievementId} AND p.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY p.order_no

SELECT a.id, a.teacher_id as teacherId, a.order_no as orderNo, a.manager, t.name as teacherName, t.no as teacherNo, d.dept_name as depName FROM sam_advisor a LEFT JOIN sam_teacher t ON a.teacher_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON t.dep_id = d.dept_id WHERE a.achievement_id = #{achievementId} AND a.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY a.order_no

SELECT id, type, file_type as fileType, origin_name as originName, store_name as storeName, file_path as filePath, file_url as fileUrl, file_size as fileSize FROM sam_attachment WHERE achievement_id = #{achievementId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY upload_time DESC

SELECT s.name AS projectName, s.reimbursement_time AS reimbursementTime, (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(reimbursement_fee), 0) FROM sam_achievement WHERE reimbursement_item_id = s.id AND del_flag = '0') AS totalAmount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sam_achievement WHERE reimbursement_item_id = s.id AND del_flag = '0') AS totalCount FROM sam_reimbursement_items s WHERE s.id = #{reimbursementItemId} AND s.del_flag = '0'
